TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Wu Lei == kawas tay 1999, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Wu Lei, squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Wu Lei minkahul Shanghai na Cyukoku. pinqbaqan nya Wu Lei, t'aring kawas tay 2017 tehuk kawas tay 2021, mqwas biru sa Beijing ega' pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Wu Lei hiya ga m'engi. Wu Lei ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga ¬∑śúąŚćáśĽĄśĶ∑ (2022) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: == wu lei == kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, wu lei, s~…ēquliq na ¶~ ®jukoku Ē. qjanux na s~…ēraral wu lei minkańßul s~…ēńßaŇčńßai na ¶~ ®jukoku. pinqő≤aqan nja wu lei, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa ő≤eijiŇč e…£a Ē pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja wu lei ńßija …£a m ĒeŇči. wu lei ima pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja zjuwaw …£a ***** (****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
S.FORM: == Wu Lei == kawas tay 1999, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Wu Lei, squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Wu Lei minkahul Shanghai na Cyukoku. pinqbaqan nya Wu Lei, t'aring kawas tay 2017 tehuk kawas tay 2021, mqwas biru sa Beijing ega' pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Wu Lei hiya ga m'engi.
